prs.title: Adding support of MOES/Tuya Zigbee AM25 Tubular Motor for motorized roller blinds and window shades (_TZE200_nv6nxo0c / TS0601)
Addition of Garage Door Controller and combined Fan on/off, fan speed, Light on/off drivers.

aiSummary:
# Universal Tuya Zigbee GitHub Activity Summary

## New Device Requests
1. **Smart Switch (TYZGTH1CH-D1RF)**  
   - **New Fingerprint:** `_TZ3000_xxxxx`  
   - **Existing Fingerprint:** `_TZ3218_7fiyo3kv` (drivers: `switch_temp_sensor`)  
   - **Issue Link:** [Device Request - Issue #1329](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1329)  
   - **Status:** Open

## Existing Fingerprints Supported
- **Plug Energy Monitor**  
  - Fingerprints:  
    - `_TZ3210_w0qqde0g`  
    - `_TZ3210_xzhnra8x`  
  - **Issue Links:**  
    - [Issue #137](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/137) (Open)  
    - [Issue #110](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/110) (Closed)

- **Button Emergency SOS**  
  - Fingerprint: `_TZ3000_gjnozsaz`  
  - **Issue Link:** [Issue #110](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/110) (Closed)

## Fingerprints from Forks to Integrate
- No new fingerprints from forks have been identified for integration at this time.
